title: Organza Ribbon, 5m Iridescent Trim Fabric Ruffles, White Organza Ribbon for DIY Costumes, Wedding Decorations, Gift Wrapping, 14cm Width
features: Premium Organza Ribbon: This 5-metre length of iridescent organza ribbon features a delicate ruffled design, adding a touch of elegance to any project; The shimmering white finish creates a captivating effect under light, perfect for enhancing visual appeal

Versatile Crafting Material: Ideal for DIY costumes, wedding decorations, and gift wrapping; The lightweight yet durable fabric holds its shape well, making it suitable for various creative applications such as jellyfish costumes and home decor

High-Quality Fabric: Made from fine organza, this ribbon offers a smooth texture with a subtle sheen; The double-stitched edges ensure durability and prevent fraying, providing a reliable material for sewing and crafting

Easy to Use: The 14cm width and 5m length provide ample material for multiple projects; The flexible yet firm structure allows for easy shaping and styling, whether for garment trims or decorative accents

Enhance Your Creations: This iridescent organza ribbon adds a unique and eye-catching element to any design; Perfect for special occasions like weddings, parties, and festive decorations, it elevates the overall aesthetic of your handmade items
description: This exquisite 5-metre organza ribbon features a stunning iridescent white finish that shimmers under light, making it a versatile choice for various creative projects. With a width of 14cm, the ribbon is perfect for adding elegant ruffled accents to DIY costumes, wedding decorations, and gift wrapping. The high-quality organza fabric ensures durability and a smooth texture, while the double-stitched edges prevent fraying, providing a reliable material for all your crafting needs. Whether you're designing a jellyfish costume, embellishing a wedding dress, or creating decorative accents for home decor, this iridescent organza ribbon offers endless possibilities. Its lightweight yet firm structure allows for easy shaping and styling, making it a favourite among DIY enthusiasts and professional designers alike. Elevate your creations with this captivating ribbon that adds a touch of sophistication to any project.
